raw_consumer_statement:
Made a reservation for a hotel that was paid through XXXX and the hotel charged my card when I arrived. 
I disputed the excess charge online through the Citi website. However it is still showing up on my account as due. 
There is a message when I sign in to upload documentation which I tried to do 3 times and get an error message every time. 
I have reached out to Citi through the support option online and got an automated response as well as the text support which provides an automated response and no actual help. 
There is a message section on the Citi website but you can not simply open and read the messages you have to download them and I don't have a device to do that so I have no way to use those. 
I can not physically speak due to a medical issue so I have no way to make a phone call to call them. This is not the first time Citi refused to investigate an incorrect charge on my account. This is their way of stealing from folks who they know have little recourse to dispute such charges.
